title: satureja montana var. obovata
intro: Satureja montana var. obovata, also known as Obovate Summer Savory, is a variety of the Satureja montana plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Obovate Summer Savory is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
